data.name: Sex Game - Naughty Couple - Episode 6
data.detailed_description:
A simple SEX SIMULATION game with VISUAL NOVEL elements, featuring HD GRAPHICS and juicy ANIMATIONS.

Damien and Lora take a private jet to an exotic location. A long flight becomes more pleasant once the two of them start fooling around and decide to join the mile high club by engaging in sex.


Control the sex between the two of them.
Follow the 2 sliders and keep the sex going by pressing SPACE or CLICKING THE MOUSE at the right time, to avoid the arousal level to drop or your stamina to run out, and lose the game.
Go through various sex styles and positions, to avoid the arousal level to stop increasing.
All this, in high quality, realistic animations and renderings.

FEATURES

- Image and video gallery, so you can enjoy the animations and renderings.
- HD renders and animations.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2 GHz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card supporting DirectX 9.0c
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
